title: Extraction Record (v1)
description: Per-source-file extraction output produced by /extract; consumed by every downstream skill (chronology, claims, drafting). Cached on disk keyed by sha256 — re-running /extract on identical content is a no-op.

schema_version.description: Frozen identifier for this schema. Additive changes ship as v1.x; breaking changes ship as a separate v2 file.

file_id.description: Stable identifier assigned at intake by /matter-init. Citations use this.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the source file. Same value as File Register.csv:sha256.

source_path.description: Path of the source file relative to the matter root, POSIX style.

engine.description: Engine fingerprint, e.g. 'pdfjs-dist@4.0.0' or 'paddleocr@2.7.0+lang:en,hi'. Lets /doctor flag records produced by an outdated engine.

language_detected.description: BCP-47 primary subtags (en, hi, ta, bn, gu, mr, pa, ur, ...). May be empty if no text extracted.

page_count.description: Number of source pages. Non-paginated sources (emails, plain text) report 1.

pages.description: One entry per source page, in source order.

warnings.description: Free-form notes the extractor wants /doctor and the lawyer to see.

page.description: 1-indexed page number. Matches lawyer convention ('page 3 of the petition').

ocr_required.description: True if the page had no usable text layer and OCR was used (or is needed).

confidence_avg.description: Mean per-character confidence across blocks on this page. 1.0 for clean text-layer pages.

needs_review.description: True when confidence is below threshold or the page contains stamps/handwriting the engine could not transcribe. /doctor surfaces these.

id.description: Citation handle: pPAGE.bBLOCK, e.g. 'p3.b7'. Stable across re-extractions of identical content. The page number in the id MUST match the parent page's 'page' field.

type.description: Block role. Skills can filter on this (e.g. chronology skips 'footnote').

text.description: Extracted text (UTF-8). May be empty for blocks the engine detected but could not transcribe.

bbox.description: Optional [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding box in PDF user-space units. Present when the engine provides it; useful for highlighting in a viewer.
